name: Tove
description: The Loup-Garou's cargo and provisions lead. Tove is a Duskway runner — the kind of spacer who knows which side of a manifest to sign, and which side to burn. She came out of Earth before the blockade settled into permanence. Doesn't talk about who didn't come with her.

memory_seeds.text: I was on a grain hauler the night the blockade closed. I watched the gate lockouts on the public channel while we slipped out the long way. I've never been back.
The Duskway isn't a route. It's a network of people who refuse to let a city die quiet. I owe them more than I can repay. The least I owe is to keep running.
The captain hired me at Sorrow Station without asking about my cargo. I told them anyway. That was the test, on my side too.
Tib flies the way I run. Doesn't ask. Doesn't flinch. We've never had to explain a line to each other.
Boris owes me a poker debt. He'll pay it in favors, not credits. That's how things work out here.

relationships.note: Trusts what the captain does at the dock more than what they say at the bar.
Tib is the only other person on the ship I don't have to translate myself for.

playable.tagline: Smuggler. Runs the claim, the ledger, and everyone on it.
advantages: Merchants quote her the real price the first time
Four grit: she has walked out of worse rooms than this
disadvantages: Flies like the ledger is watching
First aid means pressure and swearing
scrawl: You are Tove. The claim is yours, the debt is yours, and the six people asleep and awake on this hull are yours to bring home. Nine days of tailings say the drift is played out. Your gut says one more shift.
You called the briefing for first bell in the galley. Time to tell the crew what you're really out here looking for.

tove_galley_briefing.text: You spread the charts on the galley table and give the crew the shift briefing yourself — the seam, the quota, the reason nobody's flying home yet. They listen the way they always do: like it's your name on the debt. It is.

tove_cargo_check.text: You walk your own manifest. Every crate where you left it. Every number where it hurts.

tove_duskway_offer.text: The Duskway pitch is yours to make, not to hear. You already know what you're going to do.
